content:
A:
Oh yeah twice now
Love it so far

D:
Nice. Yeah, it’s a lot of fun. And the flows and bars are top tier Em
I really wish he’d snuck Temporary earlier in the tracklist somehow and ended with Guilty Conscious 2 tho. The songs after that feel a little gratuitous
But it’s a really solid album that will sit comfortably with the best of his discography
That’s really my only complaint. Oh, and I would have paid good money if he would have put 50 on Head Honcho instead of EZ Mil
Beat feels like it was made for a 50 x Em collab

A:
Toby feels a bit out of place now for me
Even though I love it

D:
Yeah. Almost felt like it should have been a Side A, Side B situation

A:
Em sounds incredible imo. The whole album he kills. Got his sense of humor and just mad experience

D:
Yeah man. Surprised he could summon that pilled out Encore voice for Brand New Dance too

A:
It's funny how somebody saved me a sort of pre-purpose from an originally big head kinda like kind of used panda
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 7 (chunk 7/10)
